steps.descriptionText: Mountain Spirit is an old man who likes to tell stories. He has a lot of story books. Elaine and Bob from Celestial State always come to read the books. But beasts and wild animals also come to hear his story. Elaine and Bob may be eaten. It is said Mountain Spirit wants a Claybeast. No one knows why. Tip: "Task 491" and "Task 493" Single selection ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡

After reading the book, Elaine finds it's a treasure-hunting book. She is very happy and wants to share this with her friend Bob and then they can find the treasure together. Please report this news to Bob. ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡

Bob becomes jealous when he heard the news, but he pretends to be indifferent. He is so sly that he gives you some hard tests to finish. But it's your destiny if you want to find the treasures.Go to kill some Skull Soldier and back to Bob for answer. ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡
Bring the bag to Elaine, please. Maybe that's a sensible choice... Tip: Complete "Task 490" ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡

Bob has got Mountain Spirit's story book. He laughed viciously. He decided to keep it secret to Elaine. Mountain shall have more treasures, thus he went to locate Mountain Spirit. Mountain Spirit refuses to tell him where the treasure is and called beasts to drive him which made Bob angry. ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡
